productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men Black Flip Flops
description: Style Note These comfortable and cool grey numero uno flip flops with bold black lettering along the centre is a perfect way to give the cool edge to casual dressing. Wear these with your jeans or any other casuals and take a bit of summer cool with you wherever you go. Product Details Grey flip flop with rubber thong straps and rubber toe separator Soft footbed Rigid rubber outsole Material and Care Rubber Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
